segments.text: Want to juggle but Puff lands way too safely
segments.original_text: 着地狩りたいけどプリン着地悠々自適

segments.text: The neutral spacing's not as comfortable though
segments.original_text: ただ差し合いは悠々自適ともいかず

full_text: Want to juggle but Puff lands way too safely The neutral spacing's not as comfortable though

corrections.original: 着地借りたいけどプリント着地悠々自敵
corrections.corrected: 着地狩りたいけどプリン着地悠々自適
corrections.rule: misheard: 借り→狩り, プリント→プリン, 自敵→自適
